candidates.why: Exact top-line revenue label; equals Net Sales in preview and is a standard total revenue line.

candidates.why: COGS component, not revenue.

candidates.why: COGS/R&D-related amortization, not revenue.

Expense line, not revenue.
Balance-sheet accrual asset, not top-line revenue.

variables.notes: Selected the exact revenue total from the candidate list. 'Net Sales' also appears in the sheet, but candidate guidance says use provided candidates whenever possible; 'Total Revenue' is the best match.

candidates.why: Direct COGS line and best semantic match.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Cost of Revenue
candidates.why: Only a component of COGS, not the full reported COGS line.
Component/possibly sparse, not the full reported COGS line.
Component/possibly sparse, not the full reported COGS line.
Also a full COGS line; identical values to Cost of goods sold, but slightly less direct wording.

variables.notes: Chose the most direct full COGS label. 'Cost of revenues/COGS' is a duplicate full-line alternative with identical values, so only one row is selected.

candidates.why: Clear SG&A component and populated.
SG&A-related but appears empty/supplemental versus the main selling expense line.
Clear SG&A component and populated.
Administrative overhead component; may be a subcomponent of Administrative expenses.
Overhead-like operating expense bucket, but likely additional/supplemental and not needed when clearer SG&A components exist.
Could be SG&A-related in some firms, but empty and non-specific here.
Explicit SG&A row exists, but appears unpopulated in preview.
Amortization should be excluded from XSGA per instructions.
Depreciation should be excluded from XSGA per instructions.

variables.notes: Per XSGA rule (b), an explicit SG&A row exists but appears mostly empty in the preview, so include that SG&A row and also a closest overhead bucket for coverage. 'Administrative expenses' is chosen as the additional overhead bucket. 'Selling Expenses' is not added to avoid likely overlap/double counting with the explicit SG&A row if it is populated in some years.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: R&D-related amortization component, not the main R&D expense line.
Clear standalone R&D expense label.

Capitalized offset, not the primary expense line.

candidates.why: Specific amortization component, not main R&D expense.
Depreciation component, not main R&D expense.

candidates.why: Lease depreciation component, not main R&D expense.
Also a strong standalone R&D expense label; may reflect a reporting-label change.
Balance-sheet asset, not period R&D expense.
Balance-sheet accumulated amortization, not period R&D expense.
Balance-sheet style label, not period R&D expense.

variables.notes: Provided as a priority list because the reported R&D label may vary by year. Both are valid standalone expense lines; later code should take the first non-missing value.

candidates.why: Best available broad financing-cost line; use if no cleaner direct interest expense is available in a year.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Direct interest expense label, but limited to lease liabilities and likely only a component.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Direct interest expense label and preferred when available.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Direct interest expense label but supplemental and lease-specific.
Balancing line should not be preferred when a named line exists.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Priority list: prefer the explicit interest-expense line, then fall back to 'Financial Expenses' for years where only the broader finance-cost line is reported. Excluded lease-interest-only rows because XINT should represent the single reported interest line, not a component sum.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the Parent Company
candidates.why: Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests, as required.
Balancing line, not an equity statement line to use.
Total balance sheet amount, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the Parent Company

variables.notes: Chosen because it excludes non-controlling interests, which prevents double counting when MIB is added separately.

candidates.why: Income-statement attribution, not balance-sheet minority interest.
Direct balance-sheet NCI line; best match.
Also a direct balance-sheet NCI line; likely alternate label across years.
Income-statement attribution total, not balance-sheet NCI.

variables.notes: Priority list of balance-sheet NCI labels. Excluded income-statement attribution lines because MIB should be a balance-sheet minority-interest amount.
